user.title: ZoneFlow — general settings
user.description: Common settings. Zones (what you water and how much) are configured after install from the "ZoneFlow" panel that appears in the sidebar.

data_description.weather_entity: Source of the average temperature and forecast rain.
data_description.test_minutes: How long the test was when you measured the cups (usually 10).
data_description.forecast_days: Over how many days the temperature is averaged (e.g. 7).

init.title: ZoneFlow general settings
init.description: Zones are configured from the "ZoneFlow" sidebar panel. Here are only the general settings.

run_now.name: Water now
run_now.description: Immediately start a watering cycle with the currently computed durations.

stop.name: Stop watering
stop.description: Stop the running cycle and close all valves.
